retrieved_result: IFS function "The IFS function checks whether one or more conditions are met and returns a value that corresponds to the first TRUE condition. IFS can take the place of multiple nested IF statements, and is much easier to read with multiple conditions. Note: This feature is only available if you have an Office 3
Decision_Reason: The retrieved result discusses Excel's IFS function, not Docker or container setup; it is not relevant to the query.
